Name: Strategy & Growth
Summary: Clarify direction, prioritise markets, and build an execution roadmap.
Details: We work with leadership teams to define 12–24 month growth strategies grounded in market data and competitive analysis. Deliverables include a prioritised opportunity map, a 90-day execution plan, and a decision-making framework your team can run without us.

Name: Operational Excellence
Summary: Eliminate bottlenecks, reduce costs, and build processes that scale.
Details: From workflow audits to team restructuring, we surface the friction points costing you time and margin. We map your current state, identify the highest-leverage changes, and build the SOPs and tooling to make them stick.

Name: Financial Advisory
Summary: Fundraising, modelling, and capital allocation for ambitious companies.
Details: Whether you're raising a seed round or optimising burn, we bring clarity to your numbers and narrative. Services include financial model builds, investor deck review, runway analysis, and pre-raise readiness assessments.

Name: Technology & AI
Summary: Identify where AI and modern tooling create real leverage for your business.
Details: We cut through hype to find the two or three AI integrations that move your metrics — then help you scope and ship them. Practical, commercial, and grounded in what your team can actually maintain.

Name: Legal & Compliance
Summary: Navigate regulatory complexity without slowing down your roadmap.
Details: From contract templates to compliance frameworks, we connect you with the right counsel and prepare you for due diligence, audits, and board scrutiny. We translate legal risk into business decisions.
